title: OreFix
description: ore generation overhaul: only spawns next to air
body:
Ore rates have been tweaked and ore only spawns next to air and water. Ore now spawns in other blocks such as dirt, grave, graite, tuff, etc. This pack makes X-Ray and strip mining almost obsolete. This pack promotes natural cave exploration as the game should. 

Contact me on Discord with any problems: [@beyondtheend](https://discord.com/users/766257043648544779)
